author: SyntagmaNull
name: Online Data Scheduler — unique_only + lookahead=16 (Signs-of-Life)
blurb: Minimum-viable online data scheduler policy (lookahead buffer + unique-token-ratio selection). Local cheap ablation shows 6/6 seed*budget wins over random_lookahead_16 baseline. Pre-compute-grant signs-of-life submission; no 8xH100 record numbers yet.
hardware: local proxy (single GPU / MPS); 8xH100 SXM planned for grant run
reproducibility_notes: Local ablation CSVs in ablation_results/ reproduce via prototype_train_local_ablation.py (see README.md 'How to reproduce'). Real-machine path is train_gpt.py with SCHEDULER_POLICY=score_unique_only, SCHEDULER_RANKS=1, SCHEDULER_LOOKAHEAD=16, pending compute grant.
